message:
fix: Q4_K kernel row-wise access for ~700x speedup

Changed Q4_K Metal kernels from column-wise strided access to row-wise
linear access for maximum memory bandwidth.

Before: ~36s/token (strided access jumping 256 bytes per element)
After: ~50ms/token (linear row access)

Key changes:
- Fixed row stride calculation: blocks_per_row * 144 bytes
- Gate/Up weights stored as [n_ff, n_embd] row-major
- Each row has n_embd elements read linearly
- Fixed Q4_K scale/min decoding to match llama.cpp formula

Also adds test_q4k_kernel.zig for isolated kernel testing.
